title: Social Media Manager

rationales.taskAutomation: Caption writing, scheduling, basic graphics, and competitor monitoring are routine digital production AI now handles across most channels.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI content-creation and scheduling tools are mature, widely-shipped products embedded in the standard social workflow.
rationales.adoption: AI-generated posts and scheduling are now the mainstream default for social teams across brands of every size.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run the schedule-post-monitor loop across platforms unsupervised, but real-time community engagement and crisis response stay human.

tasksGrowing: Brand voice development and audience insight
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1161 Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Posting, captioning, and basic reporting now run on agents around the clock. Managers who own real-time community trust and crisis response are the ones a brand still can't automate away.
